description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent front porch supported by white columns and a balcony running the length of the upper floor. The exterior walls are primarily brick with white trim, and the roof is a dark gray gable style. The property includes a paved driveway, a modern swimming pool with a deck and lounge chairs, and several landscaped trees and shrubs. A car is parked in the driveway, and a trampoline is visible in the backyard area. The windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, and the main entryway is accentuated by a covered porch and decorative columns.
description: A two-story brick house with a gable roof, front porch, balcony, pool, driveway, and landscaped yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch with columns, balcony, driveway with car, pool, and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the gable roof, and additional trees and trampoline in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony, backyard pool, lounge area, and more landscaping details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, car, and the arrangement of trees and trampoline.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with covered porch, white columns, balcony above, and paved steps.
